title: isotrema durior
intro: Isotrema durior, also known as the Yellow Wood, is a plant species in the family Loganiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of Isotrema durior lie in its roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to their anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties. The health benefits associated with the plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat various infections, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Isotrema durior can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders.
